text:
What’s the one thing you’d do with an extra 10–15 hours a week that you currently spend on Threads posting and stressing?

Most people guess. Most people burn out. I set up a system in one afternoon that posts, learns, and improves itself — using free tools and the official Meta API. No daily work. No cost. No worry.

That time goes back to you. What would you do with it?

Comment 'AUTO' and I'll send you the details
